name: swipeable
description: Swipeable row block with hidden actions revealed on swipe.

props.name: children
props.description: The primary content rendered on top of the swipeable row.

props.name: leftActions
props.description: Actions revealed when the user swipes right. The first action is triggered when the swipe threshold is exceeded.

props.name: rightActions
props.description: Actions revealed when the user swipes left. The first action is triggered when the swipe threshold is exceeded.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer container view.

props.name: threshold
props.description: Swipe distance in pixels required to trigger an action.
